tagline.en: A value bundle for perfect sleep

description.id: Paket lengkap berisi Bantal dan Guling Memory Foam Luxury. Solusi praktis untuk menghadirkan pengalaman tidur standar hotel mewah di kamar Anda dengan harga lebih hemat.
description.en: A complete bundle of the Luxury Memory Foam Pillow and Bolster. A practical way to bring a luxury-hotel sleep experience to your bedroom at a better price.

id: Isi: 1 Bantal + 1 Guling Memory Foam Luxury
